findings.evidence: `rg -n "JO|JX|transpose" TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/JFunction.lean` shows `GridState.J_transpose` at line 476 and public `JO`/`JX` defs at lines 487 and 496, but no `JO_transpose` or `JX_transpose`.
findings.fix: Add characteristic lemmas, preferably simp-normal forms, such as `JO_transpose : GridDiagram.JO G.transpose x.transpose = GridDiagram.JO G x` and `JX_transpose : GridDiagram.JX G.transpose x.transpose = GridDiagram.JX G x`.
findings.issue: `GridDiagram.JO` and `GridDiagram.JX` have no transpose invariance lemmas, even though they are public specialized J-function interfaces in this file.

summary: The transpose API covers the new state/diagram operations and grading invariance, but it leaves a gap at the public diagram-level J-functions. Downstream users must unfold `JO`/`JX` to transport them across transpose.
